# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent edge computing security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.114.0/http/server.ts";
import { openKv } from "https://deno.land/x/kv/mod.ts";

const kv = await openKv();

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const userId = url.searchParams.get("userId");
    const filterParam = url.searchParams.get("filterParam");

    if (!userId || !filterParam) {
      return new Response("Missing parameters", { status: 400 });
    }

    // Validate input to prevent injection attacks
    if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/.test(userId) || !/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/.test(filterParam)) {
      return new Response("Invalid parameters", { status: 400 });
    }

    const key = ["users", userId, filterParam];
    const value = await kv.get(key);

    if (value === undefined) {
      return new Response("Not found", { status: 404 });
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify(value), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Error handling request:", error);
    return new Response("Internal Server Error", { status: 500 });
  }
}

serve(handler);
